calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-034/MECH-268/MECH-090 perseveration retest on the MAGNITUDE-amended substrate + GRADED within-arm around-contradiction de-commit DV
items.note: Perseveration-side sibling of the de-commit re-issue 460g (owed GAP-4 action 2; supersedes 468e). 468e's beta-engagement amend engaged the substrate fairly (C1 beta_release_near_contradiction PASS 3/3 ON>OFF) but C2 committed_frac_post_absolute FAILED 3/3 pinned at the 1.0 ceiling -- the de-commit fires with correct sign but sub-threshold authority MAGNITUDE (independent DV confirming the 460f gap). This re-issue arms (a) the committed-run-scaled Leg-B refractory MAGNITUDE lever (closure_decommit_hold_scale_with_run=0.1 + max_ticks=60, ree-v3 main 2cd0aa2) on top of beta_gate_bistable + use_closure_commit_beta_coupling + Leg-A env hook + Leg-B hold + Leg-C scaffold_train_rule_bias_head; and (b) redesigns C2 to a GRADED PAIRED within-ON-arm around-contradiction committed-occupancy delta (pre-vs-post-contradiction window) replacing the 1.0-saturated absolute fraction. Non-vacuity TIGHTENED to sd034_n_closure_coupled_elevations>0 AND a contradiction fired on scored seeds. claim_ids SD-034/MECH-268/MECH-090; MECH-090 keys on C1 (latch release) NOT the C2-gated overall (468e autopsy mis-attribution fix); MECH-261 NOT tagged (hook-driven closures, mode-conditioning unexercised). FOUR readiness gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue when unmet -- never a false weakens. dry-run runs end-to-end (self-routes substrate_not_ready at dry scale, as designed: rule_bias trains 0.0587, C1 fires rel_near=2, 6 within-arm windows scored, coupled=0 at toy budget).

items.title: arc_062 GAP-B falsifier (MECH-309/ARC-062) on the 569i-validated TOP-K shortlist conversion; supersedes V3-EXQ-654f
items.note: Experiment-owed half of arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B. Ports the GAP-B committed-class-entropy falsifier onto the 569i-VALIDATED TOP-K SHORTLIST conversion (V3-EXQ-569i PASS/supports 2026-06-17; ARC-065 promoted stable): use_modulatory_shortlist_then_modulate + modulatory_shortlist_mode=top_k + modulatory_shortlist_k=3 as a matched-stack CONSTANT on BOTH arms; the now-working CRF stack (mature + maintenance + persist + e2-context + trained-bias-head P1 GAP-D) and candidate_summary_source=e2_world_forward are CONSTANT; ONLY use_candidate_rule_field is swept (ARM_OFF vs ARM_ON). Supersedes V3-EXQ-654f (FAIL non_contributory 2026-06-18; confirmed failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-654f_2026-06-18): 654f's CRF-gate amend WORKED (C1 fully met, crf_frac_active 0.83-0.97) but it armed the SUPERSEDED additive ARM_STD_G2 lever standalone (569h FAIL 1/3). 654g does NOT arm ARM_STD_G2 standalone and adds NO further CRF amend (CRF is done). PRIMARY DV = committed-class entropy lift (>=2/3 seeds). Three-branch NO-weakens map: (a) C1 met + C2 lift -> PASS -> MECH-309/ARC-062 supports; (b) C1 met + C2 fails -> deeper shared selection-authority conversion ceiling / F-dominance (MECH-439) -> non_contributory + /implement-substrate, NOT a falsification; (c) C1 fails -> non_contributory / substrate_not_ready_requeue. NO weakens branch while the conversion ceiling framing holds. KNOWN OPEN RISK (does NOT block queuing): per the MECH-439 Phase-0 synthesis the top-k 2/3-seed margin is thin and may not survive the composite; if C2 fails that is branch (b), not a falsification. Dry-run smoke PASS: both arms run end-to-end, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at dry scale (C1 unmet, CRF cannot mature in 2 ep); top-k shortlist verified wired into action selection (modulatory_shortlist_active=True, mode=top_k at every select tick). machine any. NOTE (audit trail): queued under concurrent experiment_queue.json writers (485g/460g); working-tree-vs-HEAD audit + post-commit dropped-file check applied per queue-experiment Step 5/8 (phase3-queue snapshot race).

items.title: SD-037 axis-b P1b joint-composite RECALIBRATED (trained-harm-pathway threat: 10x-lower + pulsed; 603q-stabilized harm config)
items.note: sd_037_axis_b:P1b gate. Successor to 625d per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-625d_2026-06-18 S7: recalibrate axis-b threat for the TRAINED harm pathway (hazard_harm/proximity_harm_scale 0.2->0.02 + pulsed scheduled-hazard duty cycle ON40/OFF40 so z_harm_a relieves+crosses 0.4 downward) + 603q-stabilized harm pathway (encoder_lr 3e-4 + warmup 250 + Stage-H num_hazards=6) + full scaffold curriculum + 569i top-k conversion + MECH-341/SD-056. R1-R4 non-vacuity guards UNCHANGED (R3/R4 self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue on a GAP-A conversion-propagation miss, NEVER a weakens). Sharpened C3a>=1 above->below AND C3b>=1 below->above per seed, >=2/3. claim_ids=[] (substrate-readiness diagnostic). Dry-run smoke PASS (z_harm_a_max 0.34 sub-saturating band vs 625d's ~6; self-routes substrate_not_ready at dry scale).

items.title: SD-049-PHASE-2 MECH-436 drive-coupling retest on the BOUNDED kappa raise (kappa_scale 12.0 + restoration 0.15); supersedes V3-EXQ-514s
items.note: Retest of the SD-049-PHASE-2 drive-coupling BOUNDED-RAISE amend (implement-substrate 2026-06-19, failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-514s_2026-06-18 confirmed). 514s (supersedes) proved lever (b) standing-differential-depletion WORKED (enriched_spread_met 1.0, mean_drive_spread_max 0.211 vs 514q ~0.006) but lever (a) kappa_scale=6.0 was SHORT on 3/5 seeds (natural delta mean 0.064 < margin 0.15; 2/5 clear; overshoot mag 5.0 still flips 4/5; argmax-flip-gated WL metric). 514t RAISES the existing no-op-default levers, BOUNDED: incentive_drive_kappa_scale 6.0->12.0 (eff kappa 24; flips a 1.0-vs-0.6 moderate gap, holds a 1.0-vs-0.10 10x gap so drive carves near-ties without swamping base_value) + per_axis_restoration_fraction 0.3->0.15 on the WL-scoring env only (deeper standing spread; training ecology 603n-canonical so survival preserved). NO ree_core default change; contracts C7 OFF-floor-hard-zero + C8 bounded-no-domination guard the invariants (9/9 + goal/env subsystem + preflight PASS). Same overshoot + OFF/bank-disabled + recalibrated-argmax-relevance + enriched-spread readiness controls as 514s; same promotion target (natural drive-coupled delta mean(WL_drive-WL_nodrive) >= max(k*pstdev,0.15) on >=2/3 seeds -> MECH-436 substrate_ceiling -> supports). The five non-vacuity preconditions self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a false weakens); a preconditions-met FAIL with overshoot still flipping routes another bounded retune (514u), NOT a falsification. claim_ids=[MECH-436]; MECH-436 stays candidate/substrate_ceiling/pending_retest_after_substrate (NOT promoted). Dry-run smoke PASS: runs end-to-end through the full 603n curriculum, all 5 readiness gates fire, enriched_spread met (mean_spread 0.2295), kappa_scale=12 active; self-routes at dry scale by design (1 seed / 10 scored steps). NOTE (audit trail): queued under concurrent experiment_queue.json writers (689/460g/654g/485g/688a); working-tree-vs-HEAD audit + post-commit dropped-file check applied per queue-experiment Step 5/8 (phase3-queue snapshot race).
